THE POOL ROOM

NINE WAYS TO RACK THE ROOM

Six tables · one room · see every option, then decide

walkthrough Walk it → A first-person tour of all nine layouts. It auto-walks each room in from the Main Entrance — or click in and take the controls. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/walk.html download page Get the PDF → One tap, one file: the twelve-page options study with sightlines and pros & cons, plus the one-page comparison sheet. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/get_pdf.html decision deck Weigh the options → Set the weights to what the house values — play, hospitality, service, events — and watch the nine layouts re-rank live. https://kevinelong.github.io/pool-room-blender/deck.html

Putting it on a wall? Download the 8.5×14 print poster — same three links as QR codes.

A left 4+2 B west 1×6 C west 1×6 low D center 2×3 E center 4+2

F center 1×6 G right 4+2 H east 1×6 I east 1×6 low

EVERY NUMBER COMPUTED FROM THE ROOM GEOMETRY — NOT ESTIMATED
